realms.tagline: Crusaders, elves, and dwarves under one winter banner.
Empires of sand, secrets, and the Fallen.
The Builders, the Shrouded, and the peace they guard.

classTypes.blurb: Shield and steel. You are the wall.
The party lives because you say so.
Songs, wards, and cunning turn battles.

_notes: Race list per realm comes from factions data; race choice filters which true classes are reachable at level 10 (race x class matrix). Class TYPE is the only combat choice at creation — true class is earned at 10 via class quest (see quests.json).

rules.realmLockPerServer: Once an account has any character on a server, the account is locked to that character's realm on that server. LOCKED UX: realm select is SKIPPED entirely - the account goes straight to its realm's character creation screen. Unlock only by deleting all characters on the server or transferring off. Enforced server-side.

uiStyle.login: WoW-style fullscreen immersive, our own non-cartoony art, dark+gold classic UI
uiStyle.characterCreation: DAoC-style step flow; class TYPE at creation, true class at level 10
uiStyle.loginBackdrop: Triptych: three realm key-art panels (Daniel's mock, 2026-07-02); art files land in C:\devrt-drop
uiStyle.realmSigils: Claude-designed simple geometric crests v1 (GN sword+snowflake, ML sun+crescent, HG mountain+shield)
uiStyle.loginTagline: A real MMORPG in the spirit of the old age
